name: Soundstage Great Northern Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cornstarch dissolved in 2/3 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water to cover overnight.
2. Drain and rinse the beans, then place them in a large soup pot with 10 cups of fresh water and bouillon cubes.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
4. Cook for 1 hour until the beans are tender but firm on the inside.
5. Add minced celery, onion, and carrot; cook for an additional 30 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
6. Add the smoked ham, tomato, salt, white pepper, and thyme; mix well.
7. Cook for another 10 minutes.
8. Stir in the cornstarch dissolved in water; simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes until the mixture thickens.
9. Remove from heat, let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
